events.title: Spring Seed Swap & Garden Exchange
events.eventDetails: Join us for a community seed swap where gardeners exchange seeds, cuttings, and gardening tips. Bring your surplus seeds and plants!

events.title: Full Moon Dance Celebration
events.eventDetails: Celebrate the full moon with ecstatic dance and movement. All levels welcome. Bring comfortable clothes and an open heart.

events.title: 7-Day Meditation Retreat
events.location: Silence Mountain Retreat Center, Asheville, NC
events.eventDetails: A transformative 7-day silent meditation retreat focusing on mindfulness and inner peace. Accommodations, meals, and instruction included.

events.title: Sound Healing & Chakra Balancing
events.location: Wellness Hub Studio, New York, NY
events.eventDetails: Experience the transformative power of sound healing using crystal bowls, tuning forks, and mantras. Perfect for stress relief and energy alignment.

events.title: Vinyasa Flow Yoga Class
events.eventDetails: Dynamic vinyasa flow yoga class suitable for intermediate practitioners. Bring your mat and water bottle.

events.title: Healing Circle - Virtual
events.eventDetails: Join our supportive healing circle for emotional release, sharing, and community support. Completely confidential and safe space.

events.title: Dance Movement Therapy Workshop
events.eventDetails: Learn how movement and dance can be therapeutic. This workshop combines dance with psychology for emotional wellness.

events.title: Weekend Meditation Getaway
events.location: Plum Village Retreat Center, Healdsburg, CA
events.eventDetails: A peaceful weekend retreat with guided meditation, mindful walking, and dharma talks. Perfect for beginners.

events.title: Yardley River Walk & Picnic
events.eventDetails: Enjoy a scenic walk along the Delaware Canal followed by a healthy picnic. Family-friendly and open to all ages.

events.title: Healing Yoga in Newtown
events.eventDetails: A gentle yoga class focused on healing and relaxation. Suitable for all levels. Mats provided.

events.title: Philadelphia Urban Dance Jam
events.eventDetails: Join us for an energetic urban dance jam in the heart of Philly. All styles and skill levels welcome.

events.title: Forest Meditation Walk
events.eventDetails: Guided meditation walk through the pine barrens. Connect with nature and find inner peace.

events.title: Healing Arts Meetup Medford
events.eventDetails: Explore healing through creative arts. Open studio, group art projects, and refreshments.

events.title: Cape May Beach Yoga
events.location: Cape May Beach, Cape May, NJ
events.eventDetails: Start your day with sunrise yoga on the sand. All levels welcome. Bring a towel or mat.
